ogTitle: Oakleigh South vs Ocean Grange: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakleigh South and Ocean Grange.
heading: Oakleigh South vs Ocean Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakleigh South, Victoria and Ocean Grange, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ocean Grange has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Oakleigh South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakleigh South or Ocean Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakleigh South has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Ocean Grange scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakleigh South scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Ocean Grange scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakleigh South or Ocean Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ocean Grange has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
